info.name: Currency Lempira
info.description: Honduran Lempira (HNL) exchange rates relative to USD (base currency)

buyRate.description: Exchange rate to buy HNL with USD. Example: 26.407 means 1 USD = 26.407 HNL

sellRate.description: Exchange rate to sell HNL for USD. Example: 26.40 means 1 USD = 26.40 HNL
